messages.content: سلام
علیکم السلام. چطوری؟
خوبم
خوشحالم که شما را خوب دیدم. درخدمتم اگر نیازی به کمک دارید.
یه شعر از مولوی بگو

خیلی خوب. این شعری از مولوی است که شاید بتواند شما را خوشحال کند:

نیستی نیست، نیستی نیست تو را هرگز

جز همان که بر جان دیده نشست تو را هرگز

یا رب تو حاضری و ما نیز حاضریم

اینجا امتحانست و ما نترسیم

یعنی:

There is none but You, there is none but You, never for you,

Save the one who sat on your life.

Oh God, you are ready and we are also ready.

This place is a test and we are not afraid.
Ok let's switch to enlgish
Sure, I am ready to switch to English. What can I assist you with?

I want you to code a webpage that has a header on top with 3 items in it. Items are centered and they are "Sign Up","Login" and "About Us"
Next I want a title in the center of the page
Good, now add 3 items below the title and center them horizontally and add a yellow background to them
Now center the 3 items you added horizontally and add a yellow background to them
can you make all of the css inline please ?

Sure, here's the updated code with all CSS code set inline: ``` My Webpage
Sign Up Login About Us

Welcome to My Webpage

Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
``` Note that all CSS styles are now set inline using the `style` attribute. However, it is generally not recommended to apply styles inline unless it is absolutely necessary. It is better to use an external or internal stylesheet for easier maintenance and better readability.
Undo what you did and only make the container and item css inline
remove the spaces within inline css
